svg.title: Aether Research — Full System Architecture
svg.desc: Complete system architecture and 7-stage GraphRAG pipeline for Aether Research Knowledge Graph AI

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the Aether frontend UI')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI backend in Aether do?')
g.text: REST API · OpenAI-compatible endpoints · Rate limiting · Routing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the intent classifier work in Aether?')
sendPrompt('How does keyword extraction work in Aether?')
sendPrompt('What embedding model does Aether use?')
g.text: Snowflake Arctic L v2.0 · HF API

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Neo4j graph retrieval work in Aether?')
sendPrompt('How does Supabase vector search work in Aether?')
sendPrompt('What is Reciprocal Rank Fusion and how does Aether use it?')
g.text: Merge ranked lists → unified top-K result set

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why does Aether filter chunks below 0.25 similarity?')
sendPrompt('How does Aether generate grounded answers with temperature 0?')
sendPrompt('How does the dual-pass hallucination verifier work?')
g.text: Independent LLM checks every claim vs. source chunks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a PASS verdict mean in Aether?')
sendPrompt('What does a PARTIAL verdict mean in Aether?')
sendPrompt('What does a FAIL verdict mean in Aether?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Neo4j graph database in Aether')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Supabase vector database in Aether')
sendPrompt('Which Groq LLM models does Aether use?')
sendPrompt('What is the HuggingFace embedding model Aether uses?')
sendPrompt('How does intent detection work in Aether?')
sendPrompt('What are the three query types Aether detects?')
sendPrompt('How does Aether handle title queries?')
sendPrompt('How does Aether handle metadata queries?')
sendPrompt('How does Aether handle concept queries?')
sendPrompt('How does RRF Fusion work in Aether?')
sendPrompt('How does Aether generate verified answers?')
sendPrompt('How does Aether classify query intent?')
sendPrompt('How does Aether extract keywords and embed queries?')
g.text: Keyword extraction + embedding — parallel, Snowflake Arctic

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Neo4j graph retrieval expand seeds in Aether?')
g.text: Neo4j graph retrieval — seed → CITES / WRITTEN_BY / PUBLISHED_IN

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does tiered vector search and RRF work in Aether?')
g.text: Tiered vector search + RRF fusion — seed → expanded → top-K

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why does Aether use a 0.25 relevance floor?')
g.text: Relevance floor filter — drop chunks below 0.25 similarity

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does temperature 0 and citation forcing prevent hallucination?')
sendPrompt('How does the dual-pass hallucination verifier work in detail?')
g.text: Dual-pass verifier — independent LLM checks every claim
